description: Our platform is currently receiving a major upgrade under **Engineering Bible Vol 11**. We are migrating databases, optimizing transaction ledger routing, and scaling AI capabilities.

milestones.title: Asset & Database Lock
milestones.desc: Secure snapshot and legacy DB freeze completed. Server offline transition initialized.

milestones.title: Vol 11 Core Migration
milestones.desc: Running security upgrades, AES encryption integration, and Wallet instantiation.

milestones.title: WorkQuora V3 Launch
milestones.desc: Global domain propagation, smart-matching AI tests, and sandbox deployment.

features.title: AI Matching
features.desc: Hyper-personalized job allocation algorithms matched by skills, rating, and location.

features.title: Instant Payments
features.desc: Milestone escrow funding and instant withdrawal settlements linked to primary banks.

features.title: Live Chat
features.desc: Realtime chat engines. Workers can respond immediately once bid is accepted.

features.title: Video Calls
features.desc: Encrypted screen sharing and high fidelity in-browser video calls for client consultations.

features.title: Skill Verification
features.desc: Automated vetting system validating freelancer skills and credentials dynamically.

features.title: Blockchain Certs
features.desc: Decentralized trust certificate badges minted directly to your freelancer profile.

features.title: Realtime Tracking
features.desc: Active travel and project milestones tracked via geolocation parameters.

features.title: Smart Contracts
features.desc: Secure, legally-binding freelance contract schemas created automatically on hiring.

features.title: AI Assistant
features.desc: Built-in platform guide and optimization advisor powered by advanced LLMs.

features.title: Premium Dashboard
features.desc: Analytical performance dashboard tracking all time income, reviews, and tasks.

faqs.q: Why is WorkQuora currently undergoing maintenance?
faqs.a: We are migrating our database indexes and scaling up our servers to deploy version 3.0. This includes integrating enhanced security upgrades (AES-256 for KYC details) and our new AI-assisted matching engines.

faqs.q: How long will the platform be offline?
faqs.a: The upgrade sequence is projected to finalize on June 29. Refer to the countdown timer above for real-time live launch updates.

faqs.q: Will my active tasks, escrows, and balances be safe?
faqs.a: Absolutely. All active jobs, financial ledgers, wallets, and escrow balances are locked in secure snapshot storage. Everything will resume seamlessly exactly where it was left.

faqs.q: How can I contact support if I have an urgent transaction query?
faqs.a: You can reach out to our dedicated support team immediately via email at support@workquora.local or by clicking the Support button on this page.
